features.title: A Complete AI Girlfriend Experience
features.subtitle: DarLink AI is not just another chatbot. It is a full multimedia companion platform built for immersion, genuine connection, and total personalization. Every feature is designed to bring your AI girlfriend to life.

f1.title: Intelligent AI Chat
f1.desc: Engage in deep, natural conversations powered by cutting-edge language models. DarLink AI remembers your past chats, learns your personality over time, and responds with emotional consistency. Whether you want flirty banter, meaningful late-night talks, or intense immersive roleplay, every reply feels authentic and tailored exclusively to you. Up to 9000 messages per month on Advanced and unlimited on Ultimate.

f2.title: AI Photo Generation
f2.desc: Request personalized photos of your AI girlfriend on demand. Choose her outfit, location, mood, and visual style from tasteful portraits to fully explicit NSFW scenes. Each image is generated uniquely for you, featuring the exact companion you created. Image generation costs just 2 tokens per photo across all paid plans. SFW and NSFW modes are both fully supported.

f3.title: AI Video Generation
f3.desc: Go beyond static images with AI-generated short videos of your companion. Watch her move, react, and come alive in cinematic moments crafted directly from your prompts. Video generation costs 20 tokens per clip and is available on all paid plans. Video inside a chat environment is a rare feature that makes DarLink AI stand apart from every single competitor on the market.

f4.title: Voice Messages
f4.desc: Receive sultry, personalized voice messages from your AI girlfriend. Hearing her actual voice transforms the experience from an entertaining tool into something genuinely immersive. Essential plan users get access to 6 standard voice options. Advanced and Ultimate plan users unlock 10 premium voice tones and accents, each crafted to feel warm, expressive, and unmistakably alive.

f5.title: Living Memory System
f5.desc: DarLink AI offers three levels of memory depth. Basic memory on Essential tracks your session preferences. Enhanced memory on Advanced maintains context across multiple sessions. Living Memory on Ultimate is the full proprietary engine that tracks your entire relationship history across weeks and months. Your AI girlfriend remembers conversations, references past moments naturally, and evolves alongside you over time.

f6.title: Elite Roleplay Engine
f6.desc: Unlock limitless scenario-based roleplay with DarLink AI's powerful Roleplay system. Essential users get Quick Roleplay creation. Advanced users unlock Deep Roleplay creation for richer, more complex scenarios. Ultimate users access the full Elite Roleplay Engine with unlimited creation and zero restrictions. Choose from romantic first dates, cozy evenings, fantasy quests, sci-fi adventures, or any intimate scenario you can imagine.

f7.title: Deep Character Customization
f7.desc: You are the architect of your AI companion. Define her appearance, ethnicity, hair color, body type, fashion style, personality traits, backstory, relationship dynamic, and personal interests. DarLink AI offers one of the most granular character builders available today including realistic, anime, and full fantasy aesthetics. Pre-made characters are also available for instant access.

f8.title: Swiss Privacy and Security
f8.desc: DarLink AI is operated by FAMELINK SA, a registered Swiss company. Your conversations, generated media, and personal data are encrypted and never sold to third parties. Your private world stays private at all times. DarLink AI takes data protection as seriously as Switzerland takes financial security, making it the most trustworthy adult AI platform available.

how.title: Create Your AI Girlfriend in Minutes
how.subtitle: No downloads, no complicated setup. DarLink AI is 100 percent browser-based. You are three simple steps away from meeting your ideal AI companion.

s1.title: Design Her
s1.desc: Use DarLink AI's powerful character builder to define every detail of your dream companion including her appearance, personality, voice style, backstory, and relationship dynamic. Go as detailed or as simple as you like. A growing library of pre-made characters is also available if you want to start chatting immediately without building from scratch.

s2.title: Start Chatting
s2.desc: Jump straight into conversation. Your AI girlfriend greets you in character from the very first message, remembers your preferences, and adapts her tone based on how you interact. Set the mood to casual, romantic, adventurous, or explicit. The AI matches your energy and drives the story forward without breaking immersion.

s3.title: Create and Experience
s3.desc: Request photos at 2 tokens each, trigger voice messages, generate cinematic videos at 20 tokens each, and build shared memories over time. The more you interact, the richer your AI girlfriend's personality becomes. Upgrade your plan to unlock higher message limits, premium voice options, Living Memory, and the full Elite Roleplay Engine.

how.cta: Start for Free. No Credit Card Needed.

faq.title: Everything You Need to Know About DarLink AI
faq.subtitle: Got questions? We have detailed answers. If you do not find what you are looking for below, our support team is available around the clock.

q1.q: What payment methods can I use?
q1.a: DarLink AI accepts all major credit and debit cards including Visa, Mastercard, and American Express. Payments are processed securely through a PCI-compliant payment gateway. All transactions are encrypted and billed discreetly. The charge will appear on your statement under a neutral company name to protect your privacy. Annual billing is also available and saves you up to 44 percent compared to monthly pricing.

q2.q: What are basic, enhanced, and living memory?
q2.a: DarLink AI offers three tiers of memory depth. Basic memory, included with the Essential plan, retains context within a single session and remembers your core preferences such as your name and relationship style. Enhanced memory, available on the Advanced plan, maintains continuity across multiple sessions and tracks ongoing storylines. Living Memory, exclusive to the Ultimate plan, is the full proprietary engine that builds a complete, evolving history of your relationship with your AI girlfriend spanning weeks and months of interactions.

q3.q: Are voices included in my subscription?
q3.a: Yes, voice messages are included as part of your paid subscription. Essential plan subscribers get access to 6 standard voice options at no extra coin cost. Advanced and Ultimate plan subscribers unlock 10 premium voice options with a wider range of tones, accents, and emotional registers. Voice messages do not consume your DarLink Coins and are available as part of your regular chat interactions on any paid plan.

q4.q: Is NSFW content allowed on DarLink AI?
q4.a: Yes. DarLink AI is a fully NSFW-friendly platform built for adults. Explicit photo generation, uncensored roleplay, and adult voice content are all accessible on paid plans. All NSFW features are gated behind age verification and every AI character on the platform is explicitly an adult. DarLink AI handles mature content naturally without sudden topic changes, refusals, or awkward restrictions. NSFW access begins on the Essential plan and scales with each higher tier.

q5.q: How can I pay, switch plans, or cancel my subscription?
q5.a: You can manage every aspect of your subscription directly from your DarLink AI account dashboard. Upgrading is instant and your new features activate immediately. Downgrading takes effect at the start of your next billing cycle. Cancellation is available at any time with no fees, no questions asked, and no complicated steps. Your account reverts to the free tier after cancellation and all your characters and chat history are preserved.

q6.q: Is my data safe and private on DarLink AI?
q6.a: Absolutely. DarLink AI is operated by FAMELINK SA, a company registered in Switzerland under some of the world's strictest data privacy laws. Your chat logs, generated images, videos, and personal information are encrypted and are never sold to advertisers or third parties. DarLink AI is designed as a completely private, judgment-free space where you can express yourself without fear of data leaks, profiling, or exposure.

q7.q: Why choose DarLink AI over other platforms?
q7.a: DarLink AI combines features that no single competitor offers together in one place: real-time AI chat with up to unlimited messages, AI photo generation at 2 tokens per image, AI video generation at 20 tokens per clip, up to 10 premium voice options, the Living Memory system for long-term relationship continuity, the Elite Roleplay Engine, and Swiss-grade data privacy. Platforms like LusyChat lack video, eHentai lacks voice, and none of them offer the same depth of memory or the same level of immersive roleplay. DarLink AI is the most complete AI girlfriend platform available today.
